steps.title: Identify the list
steps.content: The sentence lists common elements in Celtic art: intricate spiral patterns, depictions of animals, and inlaid enamel accents. Because one item contains commas, the list uses semicolons to mark the major separations.

steps.title: Choose the list separator
steps.content: Choice A creates a fragment after the period. Choice B uses a colon where the sentence needs a list separator. Choice D uses a comma, which is too weak for this comma-heavy list. A semicolon after “significance” correctly separates the first item from “depictions.” The answer is C.
